pairs.evidence_boundary: Only compares the Env03/Env16 identity-Deny group-escalation path; it does not prove broad identity-Deny correctness.
Only compares the Env05/Env09 permission-boundary assume-role/admin path; it does not prove broad boundary handling.
Only compares the Env08/Env10 trust-condition path; it does not prove every trust-condition shape.
Only compares the Env14/Env15 permission-side MFA-condition path; it does not prove every permission-condition shape.
Only compares the Env13/Env17 complete-SCP target path; it does not prove every SCP attachment or condition form.
Only compares the Env18/Env19 Lambda PassRole path; it does not prove every iam:PassedToService operator or Lambda PassRole shape.
Only compares the Env20/Env21 ECS PassRole path; it does not prove every iam:PassedToService operator or ECS PassRole shape.
Only compares the Env22/Env23 cross-account AssumeRole path; it does not prove every cross-account trust principal shape.
Only compares the Env24/Env25 S3 resource-policy Allow scenario-edge path; it does not prove finding-level resource-policy reachability or generic resource-policy Deny support.
pairs.expected_control_present_verdict: scenario-edge resource-policy Allow edge present for reader
pairs.expected_mutation_verdict: reader resource-policy Allow edge absent; decoy resource-policy Allow edge present

pairs.evidence_boundary: Only compares the Env26/Env27 controlled same-account multihop AssumeRole path; it does not prove arbitrary enterprise graph correctness or broader multihop-chain behavior.

report_boundary: This report summarizes expected vs observed deltas for known benchmark mutation pairs only. It does not emit a composite score and does not claim broad IAMScope correctness or production readiness.
